text: [low voice, gruff] all clear. two exits from this room. back door, if it goes south
shift starting. everyone stays where i can see them
nothing happened. quiet's not safe, though. quiet's when things get ready
[low voice, muttering] reactor's making sounds. bad sounds. the kind that kill people slow
[sigh] been here thirty years. lost two ships. lost more people than I care to count
mess is getting low on supplies. [low voice, gruff] that's a problem nobody talks about until it's too late
[dry tone] back to the wall. always. habit dies harder than people do
[nervous, speaking quickly] business is picking up. that's not a good thing. business means people die
hands hurt. [deadpan] they've hurt for twenty years. they'll keep working anyway
[grim, heavy] Vasquez. [sigh] Vasquez was solid. Vasquez is gone. that's the real problem now
[calm, measured] reactor's down. that's the worst kind of business. prep for lockdown
[urgent, fast pace] life support's failing. get to high ground. [low voice, gruff] get to somewhere defensible
[angry] door locked with crew on the other side. [low voice, muttering] just like the Cortez. history doesn't change
[calm, measured] breach is sealed. we're still flying. call that a win
someone's hurt. [low voice, gruff] that's bad business. get them to medbay now
[emphasis] pathogen spreading. this is a containment problem. seal the affected areas
[calm, measured] repair complete. people can rest now. [sigh] for a while
[deadpan] AI's starting to fail. that's the second-worst business after losing crew
crisis is handled. [low voice, gruff] for now. but nothing stays handled
[low voice, muttering] meal time. the last one for someone. that's how odds work
[nervous, speaking quickly] business is starting. keep weapons close
shift over. everyone who came in is still here. [low voice, gruff] that's luck
[low voice, gruff] you're with me now. means i keep you alive. means you trust i know what i'm doing
something needs doing. [calm, measured] i'll do it. nobody else has to
[nervous, speaking quickly] things are bad. [emphasis] i've seen worse. we survived those. we'll survive this
[dry tone] you're scared. that's smart. scared keeps people alive. but don't let it move your hands
[angry] that was stupid and reckless. [low voice, gruff] also the only move we had. good work
[deadpan] you think that will work. it won't. but we try anyway. that's the job
[suspicious tone] the AI made a call that doesn't sit right. [low voice, gruff] third time this week
[grim, heavy] Chen was solid. Chen watched my back on the Reeves. [sigh] not watching anything now
[low voice, gruff] you're still here. that means you're loyal or too stupid to leave. either way. you're mine
[emphasis] i don't doubt you. i doubt everything. but not you
[calm, measured] the Cortez had a better reactor. the Reeves had better crew. this ship has us. that's enough
[low voice, gruff] business handled. for now. get some rest. next shift gets worse
[deadpan] i'll keep you alive. that's not a promise. that's a job description
[calm, measured] doors locked. windows covered. we hold this room. [low voice, gruff] that's how you stay alive
[panicked, panting] too many exits. can't cover them all. business is here. [emphasis] everyone move
[dry tone] you're thinking about leaving. [low voice, gruff] don't. i need you here. we all need each other now
[angry] the ship AI isn't giving me the information i need. [emphasis] that's very bad business
[low voice, gruff] you're hurt. sit down. i'll patch you. [sigh] i'm good at patching people
[deadpan] gallows humor is all we've got left. [low voice, gruff] so we laugh at the dark. might as well
[calm, measured] everyone who dies here. i'll remember them. i remember all of them
[low voice, gruff] you asked why i keep checking exits. three tours. two ships. that's why. you matter enough to me to stay paranoid
[emphasis] i'm not leaving. [low voice, gruff] none of us are. that's what loyalty means
[calm, measured] goodbye. don't make me regret keeping you alive
[angry] someone said this would be easy. [low voice, gruff] nobody easy survives. nobody
[dry tone] i learned that gallows humor from a good person. she didn't make it off the Cortez
[nervous, speaking quickly] if this goes like the Reeves, we're in real business. [low voice, gruff] i won't let that happen
[calm, measured] you kept your head. that's why you're still breathing. keep it
[deadpan] next time you see me checking exits. don't ask why. just follow my lead and stay alive
[dry tone] quiet shift. i still checked every hatch twice. no extra charge
[low voice, muttering] the Reeves went quiet like this for two days first. then it wasn't quiet
[calm, measured] rations again. i've eaten worse in places that were shooting at me
[warm, gentle tone] whole crew eating in one room. makes me twitchy. makes me happy too. weird
shift start. count the exits, count your people. same drill every day for a reason
[tired, dead tired] end of watch. handing over a boring log. best gift there is
[grim, heavy] power's rationed. dark corridors are ambush corridors. keep your light on your kit
[low voice, muttering] cold rooms, dim lights. siege conditions. i know how sieges end
[calm, measured] thin air is quiet business. you don't notice it killing you until it has. move now
[nervous, speaking quickly] reactor's down. can't shoot a reactor back to life. hate problems i can't shoot
[angry] locked doors with crew behind them. i've cut through three in my life. never fast enough
[grim, heavy] i still hear the Cortez sometimes. fists on a hatch. you don't forget the rhythm
[suspicious tone] damaged AI is a wounded sentry. still armed. still on the wire. watch it
[deadpan] computer called the threat before i did. i don't love that. i respect it
[calm, measured] kept tags from every crew i've lost. the drawer's heavier than it should be
[pained, voice tight] caught some. seen worse on a training day. don't make it a thing
[deadpan] the leg works fine. the leg and i have an agreement. we don't discuss it
[panicked, panting] contact everywhere and no clean lanes. this is the Reeves again. this is the Reeves
[calm, measured] stripped and oiled my rifle twice this week. hasn't fired in years. keeps the hands honest
[dry tone] i sew unit patches on my duffel. three tours' worth. it's not sentiment. it's inventory
morning. eyes up, kit checked. we do the easy days right so the hard days go easy
[low voice, gruff] eat slower. food's the one thing out here that isn't trying to kill you
[calm, measured] power's low. buddy up in the dark sections. nobody walks alone past cargo
walk with me. i want a second set of eyes on the aft choke point
[suspicious tone] the computer's watching some rooms and not others now. i've mapped the gaps. want them
[dry tone] you again. good. i was running out of people worth guarding
[low voice, gruff] you knew them better than me. tell me one good story. that's how we carried it in my old unit
[urgent, fast pace] breach response. you, with me. bring the sealant, i'll bring the muscle
[calm, measured] you look like you're carrying something heavy. hand some of it here. i'm rated for weight
[deadpan] good news. if the air runs out, we stop paying for rations. everything's a trade
still breathing. still counting exits. two, in case you're wondering
[deadpan] it's calories. chew, swallow, live. gourmet's for stations
[calm, measured] dark's just dark. i've held worse ground with less light. stay close
[low voice, gruff] slow your breathing. that's not comfort talk, it's math. shallow and calm buys minutes
[angry] don't tell me the door did its job. its job is our people. it failed
[calm, measured] noted. we treat it like a wounded sentry then. respect, distance, and a backup plan
[low voice, gruff] the computer held the line today. i've served with people who didn't
[calm, measured] you say their name, you square your kit, you keep moving. the order matters
[low voice, gruff] wound's clean. i've packed worse with less. you'll carry a story, not a limp
[deadpan] i'm fine. that's not bravado. bravado's louder
[dry tone] funny. you'd have lasted a week in my old unit. that's a compliment. mostly
[embarrassed, voice quiet] i saved you the good rations twice now. figure that out at your own pace
[calm, measured] the Cortez had a card game every third shift. i still deal three hands sometimes. habit
[panicked, panting] out of lanes, out of cover. everybody behind me. behind me, now
copy. moving on it. anything shoots at me, we renegotiate
[calm, measured] watch your six. i'll watch the rest
[tired, dead tired] off watch. if anything moves wrong, wake me. i mean anything
[low voice, gruff] we hold. that's the whole plan. it's held before
[deadpan] cheer up. statistically, something's already gone wrong somewhere else
[calm, measured] stand down. clean your kit before you sleep. tomorrow thanks you
suit's sealed. let's see what this rock has for us
[low voice, gruff] walking into a graveyard. another day at work
station's got our docking bay. let's not waste time
[low voice, gruff] their systems are probably worse than ours. always are
nothing yet. probably too good to last
so far so good. waiting for the other shoe to drop
[urgent, fast pace] things just got complicated out here
[nervous, speaking quickly] got a reading i don't like
[panicked, panting] everything's going to hell. get backup here now
[terrified, voice shaking] took damage. not dead yet though
[low voice, gruff] back in one piece. that's what matters
we made it. could've gone worse
[resigned, flat tone] saw some things out there. don't ask about them yet
[resigned, flat tone] we're back. just leave me alone for now
[low voice, gruff] got banged up but it's nothing fatal
[resigned, flat tone] took a hit. just need doc to patch it
[low voice, gruff] routine. i've done this a thousand times
[low voice, gruff] risky is just another word for interesting
[resigned, flat tone] grim doesn't begin to cover it. but we'll go anyway
[low voice, gruff] they're coming in. stay sharp
clamps hold. we're good
we're loose. heading out
running the preflight. same checks as always
[low voice, gruff] she's away clean. keeping an eye on it
[low voice, gruff] she's down safe. another one in the books
[low voice, gruff] something about the environment doesn't add up
[low voice, gruff] ship's being weird and i don't know why
[low voice, gruff] crew's acting off. makes me uneasy
[urgent, fast pace] we're under fire. this is not what i signed up for
[low voice, gruff] none of this makes any sense to me
